summary: Verified two bug fixes: (1) Link page auto-sync of social links from user profile when all link page social usernames are empty - working correctly. (2) Showcase page quick links bar mobile overflow fix - buttons now wrap properly with flexWrap and chip-style design, no horizontal overflow on 375px viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Link page auto-sync feature tested - when link page social_links are all empty, GET /api/linkpage/user/{user_id} auto-syncs from user profile. Showcase page mobile overflow fix verified - quickLinksRow uses flexWrap and chip-style buttons that wrap properly on iPhone 375px viewport. All buttons (My Card, Store, Share, QR) are visible and functional.

backend_auto_sync.test: GET /api/linkpage/user/{user_id} auto-syncs from user profile social_links when all link page social usernames empty
backend_auto_sync.verification: 8/8 pytest tests passed - verified reset to empty then GET re-syncs from profile

frontend_showcase_mobile_overflow.test: Showcase page quick links bar on mobile 375px viewport
frontend_showcase_mobile_overflow.verification: Playwright - scrollWidth (375px) equals docWidth (375px), no horizontal overflow

frontend_showcase_buttons_wrap.test: Quick link buttons wrap within viewport
frontend_showcase_buttons_wrap.verification: Screenshot shows My Card, Store, Share on row 1; QR on row 2 - all visible and clickable

frontend_showcase_button_functionality.verification: Playwright - QR button shows QR code, My Card navigates to /p/{id}

frontend_linkpage_social_display.test: Public link page shows synced social links
frontend_linkpage_social_display.verification: Playwright - SOCIALS header visible, Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn all displayed
